blended.narrative: Keystone is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 6,533 ft. Mild temps with highs near 43°F.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 2.1" of snow, highs of 43°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.

recent_conditions.narrative: 3.2" of new snow over the past week. Snowpack is holding steady. Current depth: 36".
